request.description:
Returns:
- contact: email (from token) + phone/city/country (AI-extracted from resume on first call, from DB on subsequent calls)
- resumes: list of user's uploaded resumes
- job: title, company, location
- screeningQuestions: AI-generated questions (cached after first call)

Note: 'contact.source' will be 'extracted' on first call and 'saved' after contact is saved.

response.name: Success - First Time (AI Extracted)

request.description:
Manually save or update user's contact info.
All fields are optional — only send what needs to be updated.
This data is reused across all future Easy Apply submissions.

Submit Easy Apply for a job.

Behavior:
- Validates resume belongs to the user
- Prevents duplicate applications (same user + job = 409)
- Saves contact info to DB for future use
- Sends confirmation email to user
- Returns application record

Errors:
- 404: Job not found
- 404: Resume not found / doesn't belong to user
- 409: Already applied to this job

response.name: Error - Already Applied

request.description: Returns all jobs the authenticated user has applied to, sorted by most recent first.
